mnemonic:
bullet ['bulɪt]
***
ПУЛИ были у бабули (т). (это) bullet

examples.eng: Every bullet has its billet.
A bullet grazed his arm.
The bullet went flying over my head.
examples.ru: Пуля пролетела у меня над головой.

examples.eng: The bullet lodged in her shoulder.
A bullet sang past my ear.
One bullet punctured his lung.
The bullet tore through his leg.
How long will it take for the bullet wound to heal over?
A bullet whistled past him.
He fired at him, but the bullet went wide.
examples.ru: Он в него выстрелил, но пуля прошла мимо.

examples.eng: The bullet didn't come close.
the zing of the passing bullet
The bullet got him in the leg.
The bullet explodes on impact.
The bullet penetrated her chest
examples.ru: Пуля проникла в ее грудную клетку

examples.eng: The bullet lodged in his brain.
The bullet embedded itself in a wall.
The bullet had gone through his hand.
examples.ru: Пуля прошла через его руку навылет.

examples.eng: lodge a bullet in the table
His life has been snuffed out by a bullet.
The bullet pierced his lung.
The bullet narrowly missed her heart.
examples.ru: Пуля чуть было не попала ей в сердце. (прошла очень близко от сердца)

examples.eng: The bullet failed to penetrate.
The bullet sang past his helmet.
I finally bit the bullet and left.
examples.ru: В конце концов, я собрался с духом и ушёл.

examples.eng: He was killed by an assassin's bullet.
Doctors had to operate to remove the bullet.
examples.ru: Врачам пришлось провести операцию, чтобы извлечь пулю.

examples.eng: The bullet passed not five inches from my head!
examples.ru: Пуля прошла меньше, чем в пяти дюймах от моей головы!

examples.eng: He was killed by a single bullet.
The bullet had entered his brain.
